title: Students' detention: Police tell Delhi HC they are being probed for disappearance of woman, supporting Maoism
description: The Delhi Police on Friday told the Delhi High Court that students and activists allegedly detained earlier this month in the city are under investigation for the alleged disappearance of a woman and supporting Maoist/Naxalite ideologies. In an affidavit filed before the High Court, the police said that the persons were called for “lawful questioning” on March 12, March 13 and March 14 and allowed to leave each day with specific directions to appear as directed in the notice. The alleg
